content.text:
The neighbor atoms of atom index 14 (Nitrogen, N) are:

- Atom index 13 (Carbon, C)
- Atom index 15 (Carbon, C)
- Atom index 20 (Hydrogen, H)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is **7168**.

Regarding file organization, I recommend creating a dedicated folder (e.g., "molecule_data_7168") and moving the following files into it:
1. .geomconf_7168.xyz.view.json
2. file_log.txt  
3. geomconf_7168.xyz

This will keep the working directory clean and group related files together.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 14, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
